title: The Pension Provider Survey 2024/25
body: "This report was commissioned to inform a broad programme of analysis and policy work following the Pension Schemes Bill announced in July 2024 and the second phase of the Pensions Investment Review which was already underway at the time of commissioning.   The survey was designed to gather data on key metrics relating to Defined Contribution pension schemes, covering both trust-based and contract-based schemes. The survey covered topics including asset distribution and performance, charges and decumulation.   "
